type_definitions.name: SchemaExportDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure DTO for domain::schema::SchemaExport. Serialize-only wire format carrier used by apps/cli/src/commands/domain.rs::export_schema to emit BRIDGE-01 JSON. Owns crate_name + Vec of TypeInfoDto / FunctionInfoDto / TraitInfoDto / ImplInfoDto. Constructed via From<&SchemaExport>. No Deserialize / TryFrom — encode-only path. Recovers hexagonal purity from bridge01 commit a5e4c6b.

type_definitions.name: TypeInfoDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure DTO for domain::schema::TypeInfo. Nested inside SchemaExportDto::types. Holds name + kind (TypeKindDto) + docs + members (Vec<MemberDeclarationDto>) + module_path. Mirrors the public fields of domain TypeInfo with 1:1 naming.

type_definitions.name: FunctionInfoDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure DTO for domain::schema::FunctionInfo. Used in SchemaExportDto::functions and inside TraitInfoDto::methods / ImplInfoDto::methods. Holds name + docs + return_type_names + has_self_receiver + params (Vec<SchemaParamDto>) + returns + receiver + is_async. Preserves domain FunctionInfo field names for BRIDGE-01 wire-format compatibility.

type_definitions.name: TraitInfoDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure DTO for domain::schema::TraitInfo. Nested in SchemaExportDto::traits. Holds name + docs + methods (Vec<FunctionInfoDto>). Represents a Rust trait definition as exposed by rustdoc JSON.

type_definitions.name: ImplInfoDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure DTO for domain::schema::ImplInfo. Nested in SchemaExportDto::impls. Holds target_type + optional trait_name + methods (Vec<FunctionInfoDto>). Represents an impl block (inherent or trait impl) in the exported schema.

type_definitions.name: MemberDeclarationDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure DTO for domain::tddd::catalogue::MemberDeclaration. Uses serde default externally-tagged form to match the current BRIDGE-01 MemberDeclaration wire format. Emits {"Variant": "Name"} for variants and {"Field": {"name": "...", "ty": "..."}} for struct fields. Nested in TypeInfoDto::members.

type_definitions.name: SchemaParamDto
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure DTO for domain::tddd::catalogue::ParamDeclaration within the schema-export context. Schema prefix distinguishes from catalogue_codec.rs private ParamDto which carries L1 '::' enforcement for catalogue decode validation — schema_export_codec is encode-only and does not need that constraint. Holds name + ty.

type_definitions.name: SchemaExportCodecError
type_definitions.description: Public error enum for infrastructure::schema_export_codec::encode(). Propagates serde_json failures via Json(#[from] serde_json::Error). Used by apps/cli/src/commands/domain.rs::export_schema to surface serialization errors as CliError::Message.
